Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 3.4 cm x 1.1 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 26% slough, 74% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Surgical to Abdominal wall / Measures 3.4 cm x 1.1 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
